name: codemap
description: 158-action heterogeneous-graph codebase analysis — native Rust tree-sitter AST across 15 languages (TS/JS/TSX/JSX/Python/Rust/Go/Java/Ruby/PHP/C/C++/Bash/Lua/Kotlin/SQL), function-level call graphs, 17 NetworkX centrality measures (PageRank/HITS/Betweenness/Eigenvector/Katz/Closeness/Harmonic/Load/StructuralHoles/VoteRank/Group/Percolation/CurrentFlow/SubgraphCentrality/SecondOrder/Dispersion/Reaching/Trophic/CurrentFlowCloseness), Leiden community detection + 4 more (k-core/k-clique/modularity-max/divisive), classical algorithms (Bellman-Ford/A*/Floyd-Warshall/MST/cliques/k-shortest/max-flow/feedback-arc/SCC/topo-sort/dominator-tree/Steiner/subgraph-iso), link prediction, temporal graph evolution (node-lifespan/edge-churn/community-evolution), graph exports (JSON/GraphML/GEXF), meta-path queries across typed nodes, bridges/clusters/islands, CPG data-flow + taint + slicing, PE/ELF/Mach-O/Java/WASM binary RE, .NET/DBF/Clarion/SQL schema parsing, web-app blueprinting, LSP integration, ML model files (GGUF/SafeTensors/ONNX/CUDA/pyc), and composite CI checks.
